title: ReceptorArchetype
description: Schema for Receptor Ascriptions — input endpoint of a Mechanism. Defines the owning Mechanism and the data Archetype that types the input payload. DM input = DM output (1:1). Tenant-defined archetypes extending Receptor MUST reference this schema via allOf.

mechanism.description: ID reference to the owning Mechanism. A Receptor cannot exist without a Mechanism.

archetype.description: ID reference to the data Archetype that types the Receptor's input payload. To change the data type, author a new Definition.
